title: Sovereign Enterprise RSI Operating System
short: Coordinate a full sovereign enterprise operating theater through proof-backed upgrade rights.
problem: Enterprise-scale RSI requires more than builders. It requires aim setting, strategy, routing, proof, review, treasury, rollback, evidence, and memory.
mission: Model a sovereign enterprise operating system with specialist agent cells that coordinate through auditable artifacts and AGIALPHA proof settlement.
why: This card demonstrates that GoalOS-native Ascension is an institution, not a chat interface.
goals: Protect institution with review and rollback
Turn accepted work into future capability
